dialogueChunks.intro: The group was hit, {player_name}. The {enemy_type} attacked at the narrowest point. The volunteers are holding but they can't last.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: One volunteer took a wound and is still pushing forward with one hand. {quest_ally} managed to save part of the supplies, but {quest_item} was scattered when things went wrong. {target_npc} is trying to rally the survivors.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we lose {quest_item}, the trip was for nothing and those people bled for nothing. Help {target_npc} recover what was lost and drive back the {enemy_type}.

playerResponses.text: Nobody's bleeding for nothing today. Let's move.
We should cut our losses and save the people.
Everything is lost. We need to retreat.

dialogueChunks.intro: We got the refugees to the halfway point, but scouts report a second {enemy_type} group approaching from {location_hint}. The diversion has been discovered.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} wants to split the column: send the fastest ahead while the rest shelter in a defensible position. {quest_ally} has already volunteered to stay with the slower group. Said they've lived long enough.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need {quest_item} to fortify the shelter point. If {quest_ally} is going to hold the line for the {quest_stakes}, at least give them a fighting chance.

playerResponses.text: I'll fortify the position. Nobody else needs to die today.
The whole column should stay together. Splitting is a death sentence.

dialogueChunks.intro: A new breach opened in the {quest_focus} an hour ago. The volunteer is waist-deep in danger and refusing to come out.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} tried to pull them back by force. They shoved them away and said there are families depending on this holding. We need more {quest_item} to reinforce from the other side.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {quest_threat} could take them any moment. But if this fails, everything about the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} lost. Find {quest_item} {location_hint} and bring it back before the next surge.

playerResponses.text: I'll get the materials. Keep them alive until I'm back.
Pull them out. No structure is worth a life.
It's going to fail regardless. Start evacuating.
